question: What is the title of a song from the self-titled 1970 album by a band whose lead singer, who was also an amateur boxer, performed on a 1971 album produced by the guitarist of a band whose 1970 album featured a pianist who also led a 50-piece jazz orchestra?

Which painting technique, developed in 17th-century Spain and characterized by extreme contrast between light and dark, was pioneered by a painter who also wrote a treatise on geometry and was a close friend of Velázquez?
What large-scale wall painting technique was used to decorate the interior of a famous 15th-century Florentine building whose architect also designed the dome of the city's cathedral?
